common.appDescription: Public digital event platform by the Department for Digital Transformation
common.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.

header.slimTitle: Presidency of the Council of Ministers

events.title: Events
events.noUpcoming: No upcoming events at the moment. Check back soon!

detail.title: Event details
detail.noRecording: Video recording is not available for this event.
detail.chatNotSaved: Chat messages are not saved after the event ends.

registration.title: Event registration
registration.name: Full name
registration.namePlaceholder: Your name will be shown in the event room
registration.emailPlaceholder: You will receive the access link for the event
registration.gdprConsent: I consent to the processing of my personal data (name, email) pursuant to EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR) for participation in this event.
registration.successMessage: You will receive a confirmation email with the link to access the event.
registration.alreadyRegistered: You are already registered for this event

errors.consentRequired: Consent to data processing is required
errors.eventFull: The event has reached the maximum number of participants

live.title: Event room
live.connectionError: Unable to connect to the room. Check your connection and try again.
live.recordingConsent: This event is being recorded. By entering, you consent to audio/video recording.
live.eventNotStarted: The event has not started yet
live.eventStartsAt: The event will start on {date} at {time}
live.waitingRoomHint: This page will update automatically when the moderator starts the event. No need to reload.
live.chatNotSaved: Chat messages are not saved after the event ends.
live.preJoinSubtitle: You're about to enter the event room
live.guestJoinSubtitle: Join the live event as a guest
live.guestRedirectToRegister: The event has not started yet. Register to receive your access link.
live.eventEndedMessage: The event has ended. Thank you for participating.
live.qaSidebarPlaceholder: The Q&A panel will be available when the event starts.
live.invalidToken: Invalid link. Please check the link you received by email.

moderator.endEventConfirm: Are you sure you want to end the event for all participants?

qa.title: Questions & Answers
qa.noQuestions: No questions yet. Be the first!
qa.qaPersistenceNote: Questions are saved and will be available after the event.
qa.noAnsweredQuestions: No answered questions for this event.

errors.rateLimit: Please wait before submitting another question

admin.title: Event management
admin.subtitle: Administration panel
admin.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this event? This action cannot be undone.
admin.noToken: To manage events, use the moderator link you received by email.
admin.noEvents: No events found. Create your first event.
admin.noRegistrations: No participants registered yet. Share the event link!
admin.startEventSuccess: Event started! Waiting participants will be redirected automatically.
admin.dateChangedNotification: The date has been changed. Registered participants will be notified via email.
admin.createEventExplanation: Create your event and you will receive a link to manage it.
admin.noAccountNeeded: No account needed — the moderator link is your access to manage the event.

form.dataRetentionHint: After this period, participant registrations, Q&A questions and any video recordings will be automatically deleted.
form.waitingRoomAudioUrlHint: Enter the URL of an MP3 file for waiting room music. Leave empty to use the default audio.
form.permissionsOnDesc: Participants can activate on their own
form.permissionsOffDesc: Only moderators can activate. Participants must raise their hand.
form.permissionsNote: Permission changes apply to new participants.

links.title: Event links
links.moderatorLinkHint: Share this link only with moderators. Anyone with this link can manage the event.

email.confirmationKeepNote: Keep this email — it contains your personal link to access the event.
email.reminderNote: The event you registered for starts in less than one hour. Use the link below to join.

hero.title: Public digital events
hero.subtitle: Platform for webinars, presentations and public meetings by the Department for Digital Transformation

video.title: Video conferencing
video.desc: Join public events with up to 300 participants. No software to install.

qa.title: Questions & Answers
qa.desc: Ask questions during the event and upvote the most important ones. The moderator answers live.

privacy.title: Privacy & Security
privacy.desc: GDPR-compliant data protection. Self-hosted infrastructure in Italy.

upcoming.title: Upcoming events
upcoming.noEvents: No upcoming events. Check back soon!

step1.title: Register
step1.desc: Sign up for free to the event

step2.title: Get your link
step2.desc: An email with your personal access link

step3.title: Join
step3.desc: Enter the event from your browser, no installation needed

step4.title: Interact
step4.desc: Ask questions, vote, join the discussion
